title: Under-Construction Flat Purchase Checklist
description: 7 critical verification steps before buying an under-construction flat

milestones.name: Phase 1: RERA & Legal Verification
milestones.objective: Verify builder legitimacy and project approvals

tasks.description: Look into the builder's past delivery history and track record on the RERA website.

requirements.label: RERA Registration Number
requirements.hint: Found on the official RERA portal

requirements.label: Builder Track Record Notes
requirements.hint: Delayed projects count, pending projects count

tasks.description: Check up to which floor the builder has approval and compare it with your target floor.

milestones.name: Phase 2: Financial Health Check
milestones.objective: Assess the builder's and project's financial backing

tasks.description: Check which banks offer home loans for the project and treat an NBFC-only list as a warning sign.

requirements.label: Associated Banks List
requirements.hint: List all banks offering loans for this project

requirements.label: Any NBFCs Only?
requirements.hint: Red flag if only NBFCs, no major banks

tasks.description: Verify whether the builder has taken a loan against the plot itself.

requirements.label: Land Loan Status
requirements.hint: Clear or outstanding, with amount if outstanding

milestones.name: Phase 3: Layout & Space Verification
milestones.objective: Verify actual usable space matches what is promised

tasks.description: Ask for structural layout drawings and note losses to ducts, lobbies, lifts, and columns.

requirements.label: Structural Layout Drawing
requirements.hint: Ask the builder explicitly for this

requirements.label: Actual Usable Area Notes
requirements.hint: Space lost to lifts, ducts, columns, or lobbies

milestones.name: Phase 4: Legal Agreement Verification
milestones.objective: Ensure all protections are in the buyer agreement

tasks.description: Confirm the agreement explicitly references the mandated project escrow account.

requirements.label: Escrow Account Details
requirements.hint: Bank name or account reference if available

tasks.description: Check the legal agreement for definitive delivery dates on every amenity shown in brochures.

requirements.label: Promised Amenities List
requirements.hint: Clubhouse, gym, garden, pool, and similar amenities
